subprograms.name: Element
subprograms.code:
function Element
   (Source : in EAstring;
    Index  : in Positive)
    return Character

documentation.description: Element returns the character at position Index in Source. It propagates Index_Error if Index > Length(Source).

Replace_Element updates Source such that the character at position Index in Source is By. It propagates
